'''gasata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachman|coachman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachman|coachman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gasata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsætæth|gæsætæth]] || [[word:gæsætæj|gæsætæj]] || [[word:gæsætæsh|gæsætæsh]] || [[word:gæsætæ|gæsætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasasatath|gasasatath]] || [[word:gasasataj|gasasataj]] || [[word:gasasatash|gasasatash]] || [[word:gasasata|gasasata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasatath|gasatath]] || [[word:gasataj|gasataj]] || [[word:gasatash|gasatash]] || [[word:gasata|gasata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasaftath|gasaftath]] || [[word:gasaftaj|gasaftaj]] || [[word:gasaftash|gasaftash]] || [[word:gasaftaf|gasaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gasatatha|gasatatha]] || [[word:gasataja|gasataja]] || [[word:gasatasha|gasatasha]] || [[word:gasataka|gasataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gasatath|gasatath]] || [[word:gasataj|gasataj]] || [[word:gasatash|gasatash]] || [[word:gasata|gasata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gasatathal|gasatathal]] || [[word:gasatajal|gasatajal]] || [[word:gasatashal|gasatashal]] || [[word:gasatakal|gasatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gasatathatha|gasatathatha]] || [[word:gasatajaja|gasatajaja]] || [[word:gasatashasha|gasatashasha]] || [[word:gasataka|gasataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gasatathan|gasatathan]] || [[word:gasatajan|gasatajan]] || [[word:gasatashan|gasatashan]] || [[word:gasatakan|gasatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gasatathaoro|gasatathaoro]] || [[word:gasatajaoro|gasatajaoro]] || [[word:gasatashaoro|gasatashaoro]] || [[word:gasatakaoro|gasatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
